ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camp session */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the camp session */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the camp session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the camp session */,
  "ymca_member_rate" TEXT /* Rate for YMCA members */,
  "community_rate" TEXT /* Rate for the community */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for participants (e.g., 13-15) */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the session */,
  "camp_type" TEXT /* Type of camp (e.g., teen, LIT, CIT) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the camp session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "parent_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant's parent or guardian */,
  "parent_email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant's parent or guardian */,
  "parent_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant's parent or guardian */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Medical conditions of the participant */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Allergies of the participant */,
  "special_needs" TEXT /* Special needs of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of payment (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  "registration_type" TEXT /* Type of registration (e.g., individual, family) */,
  "dismissal_information" TEXT /* Dismissal information (e.g., pickup time, authorized pickup persons) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the registration */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, check) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_registration_id FOREIGN KEY ("registration_id") REFERENCES registrations ("registration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the staff member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., instructor, counselor) */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the staff member is assigned to */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the staff member */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Experience of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the session */,
  "available_spots" INTEGER /* Number of available spots in the session */,
  "waitlist_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the waitlist for the session */,
  "waitlist_spots" INTEGER /* Number of spots available on the waitlist */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_availability_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waitlist" (
  "waitlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waitlist entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the participant joined the waitlist */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the waitlist entry (e.g., active, removed) */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the participant on the waitlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waitlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlist_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlist_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date the communication was sent */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the communication */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content */,
  "sent_by" TEXT /* Name of the sender */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., email, phone call) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "camp_types" (
  "camp_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camp type */,
  "camp_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the camp type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the camp type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("camp_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_staff" (
  "session_staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session staff entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member in the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_staff_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_staff_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emergency_contacts" (
  "emergency_contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emergency contact */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the emergency contact to the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emergency_contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_contacts_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)
